Petition For Instructions Amendments And Restatement
Off Calendar Oct-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Bowboski appeared by zoom for David Gutekunst.

The court noted that Mr. Burrey is not present. Mrs. Bobowski stated that she has not heard from him since he signed the voluntary dismissal, that it is her understanding that his clients are no longer objecting, clarified that Kelly and Katherine are to serve only if Mr. Gutekunst becomes unable to act and stated that he wants them to be designated as co-trustees. The court noted that paragraph three of the order will need to be modified. Mrs. Bobowski stated that her client's intent is to give nothing to Lindsey and that she will be filing a motion requesting sanctions. The Petition for Instructions Confirming Trust Amendments and Restatement is under submission with the court's intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santos. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Amendments And Restatement
Off Calendar May-28-2024 Continued To Oct-15-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Bobowski appeared by zoom for David Gutekunst.
Leighton Burrey appeared by zoom for Lindsay Brennan (objector).

Counsel stated that they did not file a joint status report because they did not know that they were ordered to do so. Mrs. Bobowski stated that she is not interested in ADR. Discussion was held regarding a conservatorship having been filed by the objector on the issue of capacity and then being dismissed, the issue of whether Mr. Gutekunst has the ability/capacity to make financial and medical decisions, concern about Mr. Gutekunst having sold his property for half of what it's worth to three individuals and still carrying the note, Mrs. Love still living in the property, Mr. Gutekunst having to file for eviction, Mrs. Brennan filing a lawsuit for personal injury, discovery having been served by Mrs. Bobowski and being due on June 11th, Mrs. Brennan not being related to Mr. Gutekunst (not my blood or legal relationship), Mr. Gutekunst's right to update his trust and exlcude Mrs. Brennan, the issue of Mrs. Brennan only being entitled to $10,000.00 if Mr. Gutekunst had not updated his trust, and the comparison to the cost of litigation, Mr. Burrey's position of his client not only wanting to protect her interest, but also wanting to protect Mr. Gutekunst's interest as a trustor and wanting to make sure that there is no undue influence, etc. The court advised the parties that it will be issuing a Breslin order and explained the requirement of mediation being done within 120 days. The Petition for Instructions, etc. is continued to October 15, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The parties are to file a joint status report one week prior.

Judge: Roger T. Picquet. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions Amendments And Restatement
Off Calendar Mar-19-2024 Continued To May-28-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Pamela Bobowski appeared by zoom for and with David Gutekunst by zoom.
Leighton Burrey appeared by zoom for Lindsay Brennan (objector).

Mrs. Bobowski stated that they have not conferred, that there has been a lot of litigation, and that Mr. Gutekunst is very clear on what he wants. Discussion was held regarding the pending unlawful detainer case, Mr. Gutekunst not liking the issue raised in the conservatorship case of him lacking capacity to restate the trust, Mrs. Brennan's belief that there was undue influence, her position of wanting to protect Mr. Gutekunst's interest, the property in Utah, the litigation with the tenant case, all of the issues that have been caused by Mrs. Brennan, etc. Mrs. Bobowski asked that the court rule on the petition. Mr. Burrey stated that they still need to conduct discovery and that he will be requesting an evidentiary hearing. The Petition for Instructions Confirming Trust Amendments and Restatement is continued to May 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status and for trial setting if needed. A joint status report is to be filed by May 21, 2024.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Jaime. Not reported.
